description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. Use the ruby:2.7 Docker image for the build job, which runs "gem install jekyll" then "jekyll build -d public" and stores the generated public/ directory as an artifact. Use the python:3.6.6-stretch image for the deploy job, which runs only on the master branch, executes "pip install --upgrade awscli", then "aws s3 cp ./public s3://johnmollberg.com/public --recursive" and "aws s3 cp ./support/index.html s3://johnmollberg.com/index.html" to upload the site to an S3 bucket. No services, caches, or extra variables are defined.
